trial.full_title: A Phase 3, Randomized Study Comparing Ciltacabtagene Autoleucel Versus Pomalidomide, Bortezomib, Dexamethasone (PVd) or Daratumumab, Pomalidomide, Dexamethasone (DPd) in Subjects With Relapsed and Lenalidomide-Refractory Multiple Myeloma
trial.indication: Multiple myeloma after 1-3 prior lines of therapy, including a proteasome inhibitor and an immunomodulatory drug, that is lenalidomide-refractory
trial.label_indication: Adult patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma who have received at least 1 prior line of therapy, including a proteasome inhibitor and an immunomodulatory agent, and are refractory to lenalidomide.
primary_references: San-Miguel J, Dhakal B, Yong K, et al. Cilta-cel or Standard Care in Lenalidomide-Refractory Multiple Myeloma. N Engl J Med. 2023;389(4):335-347.
trial.notes_for_agent: CARTITUDE-4 is the pivotal trial that earned Carvykti's 2L+ label expansion in April 2024. Eligibility centers on lenalidomide-refractory disease after 1-3 prior lines including a PI and IMiD. Distinct from CARTITUDE-1 which was 4L+ and required prior PI, IMiD, and anti-CD38 mAb (triple-class exposed) with progressive disease. If a patient has had >=4 prior lines or is triple-class refractory, evaluate against CARTITUDE-1 / FDA 4L+ label criteria instead.

agent_guidance.evaluation_approach: Evaluate each criterion independently. For each: determine MET, NOT_MET, or INDETERMINATE. Cite evidence as {document_id, quoted_text}. Prefer INDETERMINATE over a wrong answer.
agent_guidance.final_determination_logic: ELIGIBLE requires ALL inclusion criteria MET and ZERO exclusion criteria MET. If any criterion is INDETERMINATE, final result is NEEDS_REVIEW. If any inclusion is NOT_MET or any exclusion is MET, result is INELIGIBLE.
agent_guidance.unstructured_data_priority: Pathology reports, oncology progress notes, bone marrow biopsy reports, and treatment histories often contain information absent from claims/structured data. Always read narrative content. Do not rely solely on ICD codes (C90.0x is not specific enough for stage or response).
agent_guidance.myeloma_specific_notes: Myeloma eligibility differs from DLBCL CAR-T in three key ways: (1) prior-lines counting follows IMWG criteria where induction + maintenance + autoSCT may count as a single line; (2) lenalidomide-refractory status must be specifically established; (3) measurable disease requires specific thresholds (serum M-protein, urine M-protein, or involved sFLC).
agent_guidance.confidence_calibration: HIGH when evidence is explicit and recent. MEDIUM when inferable from multiple documents. LOW when requiring extrapolation or stale documentation.

recency_rules.labs: must be within 28 days of evaluation
recency_rules.imaging: most recent skeletal survey, PET/CT, or MRI
recency_rules.bone_marrow: within 90 days for response assessment, or at progression

eligible_diagnoses.name: Plasma cell myeloma
aliases: plasma cell neoplasm with CRAB or SLiM-CRAB criteria

ineligible_diagnoses.name: Smoldering multiple myeloma
ineligible_diagnoses.reason: Not eligible — must have active/symptomatic MM

ineligible_diagnoses.name: Plasma cell leukemia
ineligible_diagnoses.reason: Excluded — circulating plasma cells >=5% of peripheral blood mononuclear cells defines PCL, separate disease entity

ineligible_diagnoses.name: Amyloidosis (AL) without active MM
ineligible_diagnoses.reason: Excluded as primary diagnosis; concurrent symptomatic AL also exclusionary

inclusion_criteria.name: Adult age
inclusion_criteria.description: Age >=18 years at time of consent

inclusion_criteria.name: Documented multiple myeloma diagnosis
inclusion_criteria.description: Histologically or cytologically confirmed diagnosis of multiple myeloma per IMWG criteria, with measurable disease at screening
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Confirmed MM diagnosis (e.g., bone marrow plasma cells >=10% or biopsy-proven plasmacytoma) AND IMWG measurable disease criteria met
imwg_measurable_disease: Involved serum free light chain (sFLC) >=10 mg/dL with abnormal sFLC ratio, OR
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Diagnosis is SMM, MGUS, plasma cell leukemia, solitary plasmacytoma, or non-secretory MM without alternative measurable disease; OR no measurable disease present
inclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: MM diagnosis present but recent SPEP/UPEP/sFLC not documented; or BM biopsy stale (>90 days) without progression
common_pitfalls: Non-secretory MM (no M-protein, normal sFLC) is not measurable — typically excluded unless plasmacytoma
Light-chain-only MM requires sFLC measurement, not just SPEP
Bone marrow plasma cells >=10% is a diagnostic criterion but not a measurable-disease criterion alone
Plasma cell leukemia (>=5% circulating plasma cells) is a separate entity and is EXCLUDED
inclusion_criteria.required_evidence: BM biopsy report or pathology + recent SPEP/UPEP/sFLC labs

inclusion_criteria.name: 1 to 3 prior lines of therapy
inclusion_criteria.description: Patient has received between 1 and 3 prior lines of antimyeloma therapy. Each line counted per IMWG/protocol convention.
imwg_line_counting: A line of therapy is one or more cycles of a planned treatment program. Induction + autoSCT + consolidation/maintenance counts as ONE line if planned together.
A new line begins with: progression on therapy and start of new regimen, OR planned switch to a new regimen for any reason after a treatment-free interval.
Maintenance after induction (e.g., lenalidomide maintenance after RVd induction) is part of the same line if planned upfront.
Switching agents within a planned program (e.g., dose modifications, swapping bortezomib for ixazomib due to neuropathy) is NOT a new line.
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Patient has received 1, 2, or 3 prior lines per IMWG counting
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Patient has received 0 prior lines (newly diagnosed) OR >=4 prior lines
inclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: Treatment history is incomplete or line-counting is ambiguous (e.g., regimen changes during a single line)
common_pitfalls: RVd (lenalidomide-bortezomib-dex) induction followed by autoSCT followed by lenalidomide maintenance = ONE line
Patients with >=4 prior lines should be evaluated against CARTITUDE-1 / 4L+ FDA label instead — do not exclude entirely
Salvage chemo for relapse counts as a new line
Anti-CD38 (dara) added to existing regimen at progression = new line (DRd or DVd)
Common regimen names parse as single lines: VRd, KRd, DVRd, Dara-VRd, RVd, IRd, KCd, VCd, DPd, PVd, Kd
inclusion_criteria.required_evidence: Treatment log with regimen names + start/stop dates + reason for change

inclusion_criteria.name: Prior PI and IMiD exposure
inclusion_criteria.description: Prior therapy must have included at least one proteasome inhibitor (PI) and at least one immunomodulatory drug (IMiD)
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Patient has received at least one PI AND at least one IMiD across prior lines
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Patient has not been exposed to a PI, OR has not been exposed to any IMiD
common_pitfalls: Most modern induction regimens (VRd, RVd, KRd, Dara-VRd) contain both — usually trivially MET if any standard induction given
Daratumumab + lenalidomide + dex (DRd, no PI) does not satisfy this criterion alone
Dexamethasone alone is neither a PI nor an IMiD
Cyclophosphamide is neither (alkylator)

inclusion_criteria.name: Lenalidomide-refractory disease
inclusion_criteria.description: Patient is refractory to lenalidomide, defined as progression on or within 60 days of completing the most recent lenalidomide-containing regimen
inclusion_criteria.definition_of_refractory: Progressive disease (per IMWG criteria) DURING lenalidomide therapy or within 60 days of last dose. NOT met by prior lenalidomide exposure with subsequent response or treatment-free remission.
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Documented progression on or within 60 days of lenalidomide-containing regimen (could be induction, maintenance, or relapse setting)
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Patient received lenalidomide but achieved CR/VGPR/PR without progression on therapy; OR last lenalidomide >60 days ago without progression
inclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: Lenalidomide exposure documented but response/progression timing unclear
common_pitfalls: Stopping lenalidomide for toxicity (e.g., cytopenias, rash) is NOT refractory — this is intolerance
Progression during maintenance lenalidomide DOES count as lenalidomide-refractory
Time window: progression must occur ON drug or within 60 days of last dose
Pomalidomide-refractoriness alone does not satisfy this — must specifically be lenalidomide
If patient is lenalidomide-NAIVE, they fail this criterion (consider alternative trial)
inclusion_criteria.required_evidence: Date of lenalidomide last dose + date of progressive disease + IMWG response criteria documentation

inclusion_criteria.name: ECOG performance status 0-1
inclusion_criteria.description: Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group performance status of 0 or 1
inclusion_criteria.met_if: ECOG 0 or 1 explicitly documented in recent visit
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: ECOG 2, 3, or 4 documented OR narrative describes function consistent with ECOG >=2 (bed-bound >50% of day, requires assistance with ADLs, wheelchair-dependent for non-medical use)
inclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: No ECOG documented AND narrative is insufficient

ecog_definitions.1: Restricted in strenuous activity but ambulatory and able to do light work
ecog_definitions.2: Ambulatory and self-care intact but unable to work; up >50% waking hours

common_pitfalls: Myeloma-related bone pain may transiently worsen PS — assess at baseline pain control
Renal-impaired patients on hemodialysis may still be ECOG 0-1
Functional descriptors override absent structured ECOG

inclusion_criteria.name: Adequate absolute neutrophil count
inclusion_criteria.description: ANC >=1.0 x10^9/L (>=1000/uL) without G-CSF support in prior 7 days
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Most recent ANC >= 1.0 x10^9/L without recent G-CSF
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: ANC < 1.0 x10^9/L, or G-CSF given within 7 days of measurement
common_pitfalls: Myeloma + prior alkylator therapy often produces persistent cytopenias — borderline values warrant repeat

inclusion_criteria.name: Adequate platelet count
inclusion_criteria.description: Platelets >=75 x10^9/L without transfusion in prior 7 days (>=50 x10^9/L acceptable in some protocol amendments if marrow involvement is significant)
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Most recent platelets >= 75 x10^9/L without recent transfusion
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Platelets < 75 x10^9/L (or < 50 x10^9/L if amendment applies), or platelet transfusion within 7 days
common_pitfalls: Heavy marrow involvement may produce persistent thrombocytopenia — protocol amendments sometimes allow lower threshold

inclusion_criteria.name: Adequate hemoglobin
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Hgb >= 8.0 g/dL without transfusion in prior 7 days
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Hgb < 8.0 g/dL despite no recent transfusion, or transfusion-dependent
inclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: No recent CBC or transfusion history unclear
common_pitfalls: MM-related anemia often improves with disease control — chronic Hgb 7-8 may warrant transfusion + reassess

inclusion_criteria.name: Adequate renal function
inclusion_criteria.description: Creatinine clearance >=40 mL/min (Cockcroft-Gault). NOTE: this threshold is lower than DLBCL CAR-T trials because MM commonly causes renal impairment.
inclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: Cr documented but no age/weight available for CrCl calculation
common_pitfalls: MM nephropathy: cast nephropathy from light chains often improves with effective MM therapy
Patients on hemodialysis may still be eligible per protocol amendment — consult specific protocol version
DLBCL CAR-T trials (e.g., ZUMA-7) require CrCl >=60; CARTITUDE-4 allows >=40 — do NOT apply DLBCL thresholds here
Use Cockcroft-Gault: ((140-age) x weight_kg x (0.85 if female)) / (72 x Cr_mg/dL)

inclusion_criteria.name: Adequate hepatic function
inclusion_criteria.description: ALT and AST <=2.5 x ULN; total bilirubin <=2.0 mg/dL or <=1.5 x ULN (<=3 x ULN if Gilbert syndrome)
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: ALT or AST > 2.5x ULN, or tbili > 1.5x ULN without Gilbert's
common_pitfalls: Hepatic plasmacytomas are rare but possible — may elevate LFTs
Bortezomib can cause hepatotoxicity; AST/ALT elevations may reflect prior tx

inclusion_criteria.name: Adequate cardiac function
inclusion_criteria.description: Left ventricular ejection fraction >=45% by echocardiogram or MUGA; no clinically significant arrhythmia
inclusion_criteria.met_if: Recent LVEF >= 45% with no significant pericardial effusion or uncontrolled arrhythmia
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: LVEF < 45%, NYHA class III-IV, OR uncontrolled arrhythmia
common_pitfalls: Carfilzomib has cardiac toxicity — patients with prior K-containing regimens may have reduced EF
AL amyloidosis (concurrent) often presents with restrictive cardiomyopathy + low EF

inclusion_criteria.name: Adequate pulmonary function
inclusion_criteria.description: Oxygen saturation >=92% on room air and no clinically significant pleural effusion or active pulmonary disease requiring supplemental O2
inclusion_criteria.met_if: SpO2 >=92% RA, no significant pulmonary disease
inclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Requires supplemental oxygen, OR significant pleural effusion, OR active pulmonary disease

exclusion_criteria.name: Prior BCMA-directed therapy
exclusion_criteria.description: Any prior treatment with a BCMA-targeted agent, including BCMA CAR-T, BCMA bispecific antibody, or BCMA antibody-drug conjugate
excluded_agents: ciltacabtagene autoleucel (cilta-cel, Carvykti) — including any prior infusion attempt
exclusion_criteria.met_if_patient_has_received: Any agent in excluded_agents list at any time in history
exclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: Outside records incomplete or reference to 'CAR-T evaluation' without confirmation of infusion
common_pitfalls: Prior CAR-T may be buried in old notes from outside institutions — scan all historical tx logs
Belantamab was withdrawn from US market 2022 but readministered via expanded access — check 2020-2022 history carefully
GPRC5D bispecific (talquetamab) is NOT BCMA-targeted — does not exclude
FcRH5 bispecific (cevostamab) is NOT BCMA-targeted
Distinguish 'CAR-T evaluation' (workup only) from 'CAR-T infusion' (received)

exclusion_criteria.name: Prior allogeneic stem cell transplant
exclusion_criteria.description: Prior allogeneic (donor) stem cell transplant. Prior AUTOLOGOUS transplant is ALLOWED.
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: No prior alloSCT (autoSCT alone is acceptable)
common_pitfalls: CRITICAL: distinguish AUTO (self-donor, ALLOWED) from ALLO (different donor, EXCLUDED)
Tandem autologous transplants are permitted
Autologous SCT is part of standard MM frontline care — do not flag
Mel-200 / melphalan-based conditioning typically precedes autoSCT
Reduced-intensity conditioning (RIC) implies allogeneic

exclusion_criteria.name: Plasma cell leukemia
exclusion_criteria.description: Active plasma cell leukemia (>=5% circulating plasma cells in peripheral blood by morphology or flow cytometry)
exclusion_criteria.met_if: Documented PCL or peripheral blood plasma cells >=5% (recent)
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: No circulating plasma cells, or <5% if measured
exclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: No peripheral blood plasma cell quantification documented
common_pitfalls: PCL may be primary (de novo) or secondary (transformation from MM)
Recent IMWG redefinition lowered threshold from >=20% to >=5% (2021) — use the lower threshold
Aggressive disease w/ rapid progression should prompt PB smear review

exclusion_criteria.name: CNS involvement by myeloma
exclusion_criteria.description: Active CNS involvement by myeloma (parenchymal plasmacytoma, leptomeningeal disease, or CSF involvement)
exclusion_criteria.met_if: MRI shows parenchymal plasmacytoma OR leptomeningeal enhancement OR CSF with malignant plasma cells
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: No CNS involvement on imaging or CSF, no neurologic symptoms
exclusion_criteria.indeterminate_if: MRI brain not done; consider obtaining if neuro sx
common_pitfalls: Skull-base plasmacytomas with cranial nerve involvement may not be true CNS dz — distinguish bone vs parenchyma
EMD (extramedullary disease) outside CNS is permitted — distinguish from CNS plasmacytoma
Cord compression from vertebral plasmacytoma is not CNS involvement per se

exclusion_criteria.name: Active hepatitis B, hepatitis C, or HIV
exclusion_criteria.description: Active HBV (HBsAg+ with detectable DNA), active HCV (HCV RNA detectable), or HIV+ with detectable viral load or CD4 <200
exclusion_criteria.met_if: Active HBV, HCV, or uncontrolled HIV
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: All negative; resolved HBV with antiviral prophylaxis acceptable; HIV+ with undetectable VL on stable ART and CD4 >200 may be acceptable
common_pitfalls: HBcAb+ alone (resolved) usually acceptable with entecavir/tenofovir prophylaxis
HCV Ab+ post-SVR is acceptable
Well-controlled HIV may be acceptable per amendment; uncontrolled is exclusionary

exclusion_criteria.name: Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic immunosuppression
exclusion_criteria.description: Personal history of autoimmune disease requiring systemic immunosuppression (steroids >10 mg prednisone equivalent, biologics, DMARDs) within the last 2 years
exclusion_criteria.met_if: PATIENT (not family) has documented active autoimmune disease requiring systemic immunosuppression in last 2 years
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: No personal history of active autoimmune disease
common_pitfalls: FAMILY history does NOT count — do not flag based on relatives' conditions
Hashimoto's on levothyroxine alone is NOT exclusionary
Type 1 DM on insulin alone is NOT exclusionary
Topical steroids and inhaled steroids are NOT systemic immunosuppression
Dexamethasone given as part of MM therapy is NOT classified as immunosuppression for this purpose

exclusion_criteria.name: Active uncontrolled infection
exclusion_criteria.description: Any active uncontrolled infection requiring IV antimicrobials at time of evaluation
exclusion_criteria.met_if: Currently on IV antimicrobials for active infection, OR uncontrolled infection
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: No active infection or infection treated to resolution
common_pitfalls: Prophylactic antimicrobials (acyclovir, Bactrim, IVIG) do NOT count as active infection
MM patients have high baseline infection risk — IVIG and prophylactic abx are common

exclusion_criteria.name: Other active malignancy within 3 years
exclusion_criteria.description: Other invasive malignancy within last 3 years, except non-melanoma skin cancer or in-situ carcinomas adequately treated
exclusion_criteria.met_if: Another active or recently-treated invasive malignancy within 3 years
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: No other cancer, or other cancer >3 years in remission, or excepted (BCC, SCC of skin, in-situ disease)
common_pitfalls: MGUS is NOT a separate malignancy
Smoldering MM that progressed to active MM is the SAME disease, not separate
Localized prostate cancer on active surveillance: variable — check protocol

exclusion_criteria.name: Significant cardiac disease
exclusion_criteria.description: NYHA class III-IV heart failure, MI within 6 months, unstable angina, clinically significant arrhythmia, or LVEF <45%
exclusion_criteria.met_if: Any of the above cardiac criteria
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Stable cardiac disease with EF >=45%, no recent events
common_pitfalls: Carfilzomib cardiotoxicity may have left residual EF reduction
AL amyloidosis cardiac involvement common in MM patients
Old MI (>6 months) with preserved EF is generally acceptable

exclusion_criteria.name: Stroke or seizure within 6 months
exclusion_criteria.description: History of stroke, transient ischemic attack, or seizure within 6 months of evaluation
exclusion_criteria.met_if: CVA, TIA, or seizure within 6 months
common_pitfalls: ICANS risk with CAR-T → recent CNS events are exclusionary
Old stroke with stable neuro deficits and >6 months out is acceptable

exclusion_criteria.name: Pregnancy or lactation
exclusion_criteria.not_met_if: Not pregnant, post-menopausal, surgically sterile, or male
exclusion_criteria.required_evidence: Negative pregnancy test for women of childbearing potential

alternative_trial_suggestions.if_4_or_more_prior_lines_or_triple_class: Consider CARTITUDE-1 / FDA 4L+ Carvykti label (heavily-pretreated patients with prior PI + IMiD + anti-CD38 mAb, refractory to last line). Also consider ide-cel (Abecma) per KarMMa-3 trial for similar 3L+ population.
alternative_trial_suggestions.if_lenalidomide_naive: Patient does not meet CARTITUDE-4 inclusion (requires lenalidomide-refractory). Consider standard 2L regimens including lenalidomide-based approaches first.
alternative_trial_suggestions.if_prior_BCMA_therapy: Excluded from BCMA CAR-T trials. Consider GPRC5D-targeted (talquetamab), FcRH5-targeted (cevostamab), or non-BCMA approaches.
alternative_trial_suggestions.if_plasma_cell_leukemia: PCL-specific clinical trials; standard MM CAR-T trials exclude PCL.
alternative_trial_suggestions.if_CNS_involvement: CNS-MM-specific protocols; standard CARTITUDE-4 excludes CNS disease.
alternative_trial_suggestions.if_ide_cel_preferred: KarMMa-3 trial (ide-cel) has similar 2L+ eligibility for triple-class-exposed patients.

alternative_trials_suggested: trial IDs if patient fails CARTITUDE-4 but fits elsewhere
